extortion.description: Operating since 1994, Elevator One has built a premium elevator company, attracting a clientele interested in obtaining the highest quality of elevator service in the province. To maintain this level of service, we have tried to bring on the best employees both in the field and in the office, providing Elevator Maintenance, Modernizations, Repairs and New Construction Services.A long history of greatCustomer serviceElevator One Inc. is a high quality, top rated Elevator Contractor operating in Ontario. Since 1994, we have chosen to focus our business in Central Ontario in the areas North of GTA and up into the Muskoka’s and Parry Sound. We are dedicated to offering clients outside Toronto with the best Elevator services including new installations, modernizations, routine maintenance and repair throughout our territory.In the most recent statistics published by the TSSA, Elevator One was the number one TSSA-rated elevator maintenance Contractor in the province of Ontario. We have a stellar 4.9/5.0 Google rating and we were nominated for the 2018 Elevator World Ellies Awards in the category of “Best Contractor – Canada”. It is our commitment to our core values of Integrity, Service & Quality that has given us this stellar reputation in the Elevator Industry.Geo: Canada - Leak size: 1,3 GB Archive - Contains: SQL
